mapper.select:
select * from borrow
book_name like concat('%', #{ bookName }, '%')
and book_no = #{bookNo}
and user_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%')
order by id desc

select * from restitution
book_name like concat('%', #{ bookName }, '%')
and book_no = #{bookNo}
and user_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%')
order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into restitution(book_name, book_no, user_no, user_name, user_phone, score, days, return_date, real_date) values(#{bookName}, #{bookNo}, #{userNo}, #{userName}, #{userPhone}, #{score}, #{days}, #{returnDate}, #{realDate})
insert into borrow(book_name, book_no, user_no, user_name, user_phone, score, days, return_date) values(#{bookName}, #{bookNo}, #{userNo}, #{userName}, #{userPhone}, #{score}, #{days}, #{returnDate})
mapper.select: select * from borrow order by id desc
